effort_complexity.rationale: Static pricing-map correctness fix across three maps (add claude-sonnet-5, correct claude-opus-4-8 $15/$75->$5/$25) plus test assertions. No dispatch-path logic, no dep, no schema change.

design_decisions.choice: Bring the three duplicate Anthropic pricing maps (Pricing, anthropicPricing, bedrockPricing) into agreement with static data edits only — add claude-sonnet-5, correct claude-opus-4-8 — rather than consolidating them into one canonical table.
design_decisions.rationale: Locally reversible, no schema/dependency/dispatch-logic change; map consolidation is the separately-tracked Type-1 model-layer service refactor (see project_model_layer_service_refactor memory), out of scope for this correctness slice.

reachability_artifacts: go test ./internal/model/ -run 'TestPricing_Sonnet5|TestPricing_Opus4_8CorrectedRate' -v — sonnet-5 (1M/1M) = $12.00 (was $0 fall-through); opus-4-8 (1M/1M) = $30.00 (was $90.00 stale rate). Both PASS.
